calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-02-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Alisa J. Kim, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Protfolio Recovery Associates, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Gilbert R. Catano.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial, setting trial for today, January 2, 2018, was filed & served on August 18, 2017.
CCP Section 98 Declaration of Myrell Jones (Custodian of Records for plaintiff) was served on November 1, 2017.
No DOE defendants.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC, and against defendant Gilbert R. Catano, as follows:

Damages - $2,431.93.
Costs - $282.50.
Total - $2,714.43.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-02-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2017 Set For Trial On Jan-02-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
